creator: lev@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please, note, that all BDB support isd erived from `devel/apr' library, and its port doesn't support other versions of DBD but 4.2. APR library supports any 4.x DBD version by itself, it is not APR, but port problem. So, you need to change `devel/apr' port, not `devel/subversion' one!

-- 
Best regards,
 Lev                          mailto:lev@serebryakov.spb.ru
